---
title: "Efficient and Portable MPI Support for Approximate Bayesian Computation"
date: 2017-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Computational Methods
  - Bayesian Statistics
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Ummadisingu A, Dutta R, Janal&iacute;k R, Mira A, Schenk O, Schoengens M. "Efficient and Portable MPI Support for Approximate Bayesian Computation." Presented at the Platform for Advanced Scientific Computing (PASC) 2017 (2017). doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.6084/M9.FIGSHARE.17708726.V3"><code>10.6084/M9.FIGSHARE.17708726.V3</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Poster
      url: https://doi.org/10.6084/M9.FIGSHARE.17708726.V3
      icon: fa-solid fa-file-image
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.6084/M9.FIGSHARE.17708726.V3
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.6084/M9.FIGSHARE.17708726.V3
---

**Conference:** Platform for Advanced Scientific Computing (PASC) 2017

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@inproceedings{fabbri2017efficient,
  title={Efficient and Portable MPI Support for Approximate Bayesian Computation},
  author={Fabbri, Lorenzo and Ummadisingu, Avinash and Dutta, Ritabrata and Janal{\'i}k, Radim and Mira, Antonietta and Schenk, Olaf and Schoengens, Marcel},
  booktitle={Platform for Advanced Scientific Computing (PASC) 2017},
  year={2017}
}
```
